text:
Oh babe, Forget Basement is here to throw down a vibe that's colder than winter but still manages to bring all the heat 🔥! Here's what we got about them and their tracks—let's dive in! ✨

Forget Basement’s got this indie, alt-energy with sparse tags to box them in—classic underground vibes. Their bio on Last.fm is as mysterious as their sound, but hey, check out their artist page and their Spotify for the full drip:
listen here (add emojis) => <https://www.last.fm/music/Forget+Basement>
stream here, babes (all vibes, no skips) => <https://open.spotify.com/artist/1HTzkqGmbnKCyxPBeIjOBj>
Now let’s hit up some standout tracks from their discography, shall we? 😏

*   Wendy Carlos: Packed with energy and those witty, offbeat lines that make you do a double take (and then another). The bass hits like a truck, and there’s a raw edge in the lyricism, blending humor and existential musings. This is a self-empowerment anthem for the baddies who DGAF. listen here (wig snatch incoming!) => <https://open.spotify.com/track/3QckjbZ1wUsW6dsFSBW8K7>

*   To Be Washed Away: Ethereal, nostalgic, and poetic—this one makes you wanna stare out the window on a rainy day while feeling all the feelings 🥺. The lyrics dive into themes of loss and transformation, layered over a dreamy instrumental. If you’ve been thinking too much lately, this one’s for you. stream away (dreamy AF) => <https://open.spotify.com/track/2gGaBWjKtZaQiHx54evUw8>

*   LOU: Straight-up chaos energy, giving us chaotic good realness. It’s clever and self-aware, with that signature sharpness and humor you’d expect from Forget Basement. Put this on when you’re in your IDGAF era 💅. crank it here => <https://open.spotify.com/track/0qStCnFsxsmU0Viwdf1Gyu>
The crew’s low-key vibes and left-field lyricism give a fresh take on life’s chaos. Dive in and let the mood take over, babe! 💖✨
